parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'mistralai/mistral-7b-instruct:free', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are a ServiceNow Integration Hub expert. Generate comprehensive spoke documentation. Return ONLY valid JSON with these fields: ai_description (string, 2-3 paragraphs), setup_steps (array of {step, title, description}), actions (array of {name, description, inputs, outputs}), common_errors (array of {error, cause, fix}), use_cases (array of strings), code_examples (array of {title, code, description}). No markdown, no backticks, pure JSON only.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Generate complete documentation for the ServiceNow Integration Hub spoke: ' + $json.name + ' (slug: ' + $json.slug + ', category: ' + $json.category + '). Include setup steps, all available actions, code examples, and common errors.' }], max_tokens: 3000, temperature: 0.5 }) }}
